en.body: I had an excellence experience with Boris. Professional, friendly, responds in a timely manner. Took great care of our large group with dinner reservations and various activities. I will use again and highly recommend.

base.reviewerHeadshotAlt: C F — Google review profile photo

en.body: Vesica is a stunning location with both sun and shade areas. The service was spot on and the food was delicious - highly recommend the corn and the fish and chips. It wasn't very crowded the day we went but the music was perfect and staff was very friendly.
en.name: C F

es.body: Vesica is a stunning location with both sun and shade areas. The service was spot on and the food was delicious - highly recommend the corn and the fish and chips. It wasn't very crowded the day we went but the music was perfect and staff was very friendly.
es.name: C F

base.reviewerHeadshotAlt: Destiny Johnson — Google review profile photo

en.body: Tulum Bible made our booking of Vesica Cenote spa so seamless and easy, they responded quickly and reserved our spot and when we got there we were on the list and had the best time! I highly recommend them and would definitely use them again next time we visit tulum!
en.name: Destiny Johnson
